name: asplos-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ASPLOS submissions: cross-layer venue fit, the two-deadline HotCRP cycle, rapid review and rebuttal strategy, Major Revision handling, camera-ready, ACM artifact badges, hardware-evaluation reproducibility, supplementary appendices, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the official ASPLOS 2027 CFP, HotCRP deadline pages, artifact-evaluation pages, and ACM DL proceedings checked on 2026-07-08.
